title: Investigation of the diagnostic importance and accuracy of CT in the chest compared to the RT-PCR test for suspected COVID-19 patients in Jordan
author: alewaidat haytham
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: As the world continues to battle the COVID-19 pandemic, Jordan is no exception. In order to improve the accuracy of diagnosis, researchers in Jordan have conducted an investigation into the diagnostic importance and accuracy of CT in the chest compared to the RT-PCR test for suspected COVID-19 patients.
steps_raw: As the world continues to battle the COVID-19 pandemic, Jordan is no exception. In order to improve the accuracy of diagnosis, researchers in Jordan have conducted an investigation into the diagnostic importance and accuracy of CT in the chest compared to the RT-PCR test for suspected COVID-19 patients.
keywords: RT-PCR , COVID-19, X-ray, epidemics, Radiographer, knowledge
